ProviderInfo.DisplayName: [NTNU] 國立臺灣師範大學 (National Taiwan Normal University) [學網漫遊第三方資料庫維運]
ProviderInfo.Description:
請使用您學校提供的帳號與密碼登入。
本設定檔由學網漫遊第三方資料庫維護，並由臺灣學術無線網路漫遊中心監督管理。 若您確認帳號密碼正確仍無法連線，請聯絡 eduroamtw@googlegroups.com 或 roamingcenter@gms.ndhu.edu.tw 。
如需進一步了解本計畫，請參閱：https://edur.isli.me/
Please log in using the account and password provided by your institution.
This configuration file is maintained by the "eduroam TW Third-party Database" and is supervised by the TANet Roaming Center. If you are unable to connect despite entering the correct credentials, please contact eduroamtw@googlegroups.com or roamingcenter@gms.ndhu.edu.tw .
For more information about this project, please visit: https://edur.isli.me/
Source: https://eduroam.ntnu.edu.tw/
